promoted_finalists.selection_reason: second-highest registered search fitness after tie-breaks

observations_for_validation: Judge-free weighted review beat every repeated control by three exact cases on this panel.
The nine-proposer, three-critic, three-verifier replication made two useful and zero harmful corrections.
Verifier-strengthened proof repair improved a seven-case proposer base to twelve with five useful and zero harmful changes, but ranked third.
Low-consensus specialist banks did not outperform the simpler distributed-review systems.
The six promoted finalists and diversified fifteen-solver control now advance without further design changes.
